It's hilarious. It's 11. Okay. That's 11 blank pages where you could have been describing what you've, you know, what you said was a abusive relationship, but it's just blank. It was like, all of a sudden now my, this huge part of my life doesn't belong to me, especially with something that's so difficult to talk about. Let me ask you a question.
